prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SPYPAPER-STYLE-JOURNAL Product Type: BLANK_BOOK Brand (from catalog): CCS Spy Gear Existing Title: Disappearing Note Pad 32 Sheets Dissolves In Water - Journal Notebook Description: This Disappearing Note Pad looks like ordinary paper, but is unique in that it dissolves in just seconds when contacted with liquid. This will result in a useless, non-reconstructable mulch which is far more secured than the output of any standard shredder.

You can write on this paper normally, but as soon as it comes into contact with liquid (even saliva) it will transform into a secure mulch. This makes it ideal for those confidential notes that may need to "disappear" quickly with little advance notice.

These note pads are ideal for indoor or outdoor use, and we recommend folding the paper to protect your privacy while "releasing" your note in a group setting. Search Terms: spy paper dissolving paper disappearing decoder in water sheets water-soluble magic Features: - EXTRA LARGE PAPER - Each Notepad contains 32 Sheets of Paper - Dimensions: 8.5" x 5.5" | Extra Large Sheets of Paper - Made In The USA - TURNS TO PULP - Within 10 Seconds of Contacting Liquid the Paper Disappears Like a Magic Trick into a Pulp - Great for Hiding or Disposing of Secret Notes === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: CCS Spy Gear Disappearing Note Pad 32 Sheets

openai.item_name: CCS Spy Gear 32-Sheet Dissolving Note Pad Journal Notebook

anthropic.title_differentiation: Dissolves In Water Within 10 Seconds, Water-Soluble Paper, 85 X 55 In, Made In USA, Secret Note Security

openai.title_differentiation: Extra Large 85" X 55", Turns To Pulp In 10 Seconds, Made In USA, Ideal For Secret Notes
